changes: Make the Play-by-Play Trick History section collapsible in the Round Verdict modal window to prevent screen overflow on mobile
Configure default state to collapse on mobile viewports (< 640px) and expand on desktop views, with manual toggle chevron control
Elevate 'Round Verdict' (Hand Over) and 'Match Over' overlays from the 280px drawer sub-context to the root level of App.jsx to avoid clipping and allow them to take full viewport space centered
Redesign 'Last Trick Played' panel as a prominent centered modal dialog with large card previews and a blur backdrop backdrop
Reposition played trick cards on the table to float clearly outside the center circle boundaries (-45px offset) to sit right in front of corresponding player avatar HUDs

history.summary: Spacious Victory Verdict & Trick review Panel
changes: Enlarge end-of-round victory modal size (780px wide) and position it in the center
Split verdict window into a side-by-side flex layout displaying visual results banner/role points on the left, and a large scrollable play-by-play Trick History log on the right
Reposition played trick cards on the table to float outward from the center (20px instead of 120px) to sit in front of the players who played them and avoid card overlaps
Enlarge 'Last Trick' pop-up and apply prominent gold border/trophy highlighting to the trick winner
Add scrollable Play-by-Play Trick History reviews inside the Hand Over victory/defeat scoreboard modal
Expose and resolve secret partner seat on server/client game end if the partner card was never played
Implement target bid progress text (e.g. Bid: 30/95) and graphical green progress bar on bidder/partner HUD avatar spots
Fix React useEffect dependency gap causing bots to freeze when winning a trick and leading the next (added trickPlayState length and bidding logs history to dependencies list)
Create structured version history registry (version_history.json)
Expose current version badge in the footer
Introduce clickable release logs history viewer modal
Preserve completed trick cards on table until next trick starts
Add 'Last Trick' header review widget with seat-labeled card rows
Implement scrolling terminal-style Action Logs modal popup in header
Fix follow-suit bugs when leading subsequent tricks
Lift South seat HUD panel to bottom: 10.5rem to prevent overlaps
Fix checkHandEnded scoring bug (use actual defender points sum instead of subtracting from 150)
Implement automatic scoreboard slide-open on HAND_OVER and MATCH_OVER states
Import RANK_VALUES in client/server game.js to resolve 4th card freezes
Recalibrate evaluateBidStrength for realistic bot bidding (pass weak hands, scale realistically)
Set bottom boundaries on bidding overlays to unblur player card docks
Raise South player HUD positioning offset to avoid card overlaps
Implement structured JSON telemetry logs logging on server
Write log analyzer script to compile JSON records into training dataset

history.summary: Immersive Overlays, Funny Bots & Game IDs
changes: Change client board display to full screen width & height
Render scoreboard, bidding, and declaration selectors as felt overlays
Implement funny bot name generator with card/suit theme and _bot suffix
Assign unique tracker Game IDs to matches, shown in header bar
Add try-catch play fail-safe loops to prevent bot hangs

history.summary: Tailwind to Custom Vanilla CSS Migration
changes: Rewrite styling system to pure custom radial Vanilla CSS (index.css)
Implement responsive circular layout spots for seats (North, South, East, West)
Refactor Card face graphics and Spade Queen crown colors
Initialize client PWA scaffolding and express websocket rooms server
Build game mechanics state machine engine and basic AI bots
Implement unit test suite tests
